Chronology of every recorded fact about [[White Fox]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The White Fox is a madra formed from aura of light and dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The White Fox madra is unrestrained and tricks the senses by its nature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — White Fox madra can be used to create a coordinated masterpiece.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Wei Shi Kelsa uses White Fox madra.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — White Fox madra is a type of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon uses White Fox madra.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — A decoy in Kelsa's bed feeds on White Fox madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — White Fox madra is used by Kelsa.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
